symbols: pilgrim's staff — the journey of faith and the saint's legendary life of penance and hospitality
upward gaze — devotion to God and the hope of heavenly reward
green robe with gold brooch — life and renewal, the nobility of the saint's character
description: A tall, narrow fresco panel, significantly faded and damaged, depicting a single standing figure. The figure is an elderly, balding man in a green robe with a circular gold brooch at the chest, wearing a white undergarment. He holds a long staff or walking stick in his right hand and looks upward with a devout expression. The fresco surface is heavily weathered, with large areas of lost paint, discoloration, and surface damage, particularly in the upper and lower portions.
